name: bandit.extortion_at_camp_standoff_mcw
description: Named Basecamp extortion restage: start from the honest claimed nearby-owned-site McWilliams/Basecamp footing, disable safe mode, use the real wait action to advance through the live owner/dispatch/local-contact path until the local gate reaches camp-adjacent stand-off pressure at a visible five-OMT hold-off distance, and stop there for probe capture or manual handoff.

steps.label: post_load_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for McWilliams fixture; this is startup/load evidence only

steps.label: disable_safe_mode
steps.expected_visible_fact: safe mode off and gameplay still focused before time advancement

steps.label: wait_30m_to_basecamp_standoff_gate
steps.abort_reason: long wait was interrupted or produced a prompt before local-gate standoff evidence could be captured
steps.expected_visible_fact: wait action proof: before/initial-menu/duration-menu/after screenshots exist; debug artifact must show local_gate hold_off and live_dispatch_goal=140,46,0 after the bounded 30m wait
steps.pre_menu_expected_visible_fact: alarm/wait mode menu is visible, then Wait a while is chosen before the duration menu

evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for standoff/return behavior
live_required_checkpoints: post load: normal McWilliams gameplay screen after fixture install
safe mode off: gameplay still focused after safe-mode toggle
wait menu: Wait for how long? menu is visible before choosing 30m

after wait: either completed wait or classified interruption prompt is captured; debug log must contain local_gate hold_off and live_dispatch_goal at visible five-OMT standoff for a green standoff proof
evidence_contract.failure_rule: If the run only reaches startup/gameplay screens, hangs during advancement, lacks wait-menu/after-wait screenshots, sees an unhandled interruption prompt, or lacks local_gate/dispatch artifacts, it is not standoff proof.
